session.user:
Run the full fast CI suite and report results:
make fast-ci
This runs linting, formatting, type checking, and unit tests. Report any failures with details.
session.assistant: I'll run the fast CI suite for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast CI suite (linting, formatting, type checking, tests)

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- Would reformat: tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py 1 file would be reformatted, 1668 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty ---
... [109 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The fast CI suite has **failed** due to formatting issues. Here are the details:
**Summary:** - Lint: PASSED - Type checking (ty): PASSED - Unit tests: PASSED (6157 tests across all packages) - Prettier check: **FAILED** - 2 files need formatting - Format check: **FAILED** - 1 file would be reformatted
**Failures:**
1. **Prettier formatting issues (2 files):** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
2. **Ruff formatting issue (1 file):** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py`
**Test Results:** - erk: 5906 passed - erk-dev: 136 passed - erk-statusline: 115 passed - erk-mcp: 24 passed - **Total: 6181 tests passed**
The failures are all formatting-related (Prettier and Ruff). The actual linting and type checking passed, and all tests passed successfully.
